column1: I would love the opportunity to become a part of your team at [org], and ask that you review my enclosed resume.
I know that my skills would be appreciated by [org].
The attached resume details my extensive experience and training. If you choose to interview and hire me, you will not be disappointed.
The attached resume shows that I have the background and experience our industry demands and [org] needs.
The depth of experience I can offer will contribute to your leading industry position. I'd love the opportunity to help take [org] to the top of the field.
As a huge fan of [org], I was really excited to see this posting for a [position]. I feel like I'm a great match for the job and a great fit with your organization.
I am willing to use my skills as an [position] in any department at [org] and hope you will seriously consider my resume.
Your ad called out to me because the position, as described, is such a perfect match with my skills, as you will see when you review my resume.
I have researched and learned a great deal about your organization's mission and I am confident that my background and attributes will bring further support of your company's values.
I feel confident that my training, enthusiasm, and industry experience make me uniquely qualified to make an immediate impact at [org].
